title: Plan State
description: Schema for state.yml. Validates plan state files that provide lightweight status tracking for AI triage. AI reads this file to assess plan status without loading the full plan into context.

plan.description: Plan identifier. Matches the plan's ID in package.yml.

updated_at.description: Date the plan state was last updated (YYYY-MM-DD).

summary.description: Brief current state for AI triage. One to three sentences describing what is done, what remains, and any blockers.
